Name: Total time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and the final reviewer assignment (SW-AE Assign Reviewers resulting in SW-Reviewer Agreed) in a case

Name: Total time until Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 is performed from the manuscript submission (Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation)

Name: Total waiting time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to the SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time it takes Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 after the execution of SW-Reviewer Selection is now due

Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: The time between the Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and the final EIC decision (SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision, etc.) in the submission workflow
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Elapsed time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and the subsequent reviewer invitation (SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Time until Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 from the start of the academic review process for a manuscript
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to the completion of the reviewer assignment phase (when the required number of SW-Reviewer Agreed is reached)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 since the SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Time of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 occurrence relative to the total manuscript review cycle time
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 Cycle Time within the reviewer selection sub-process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Average duration from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to the next editor intervention (Assign a Different Editor or Unassign Editor)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Ratio of time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 compared to the time from the first SW-AE Assign Reviewers to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1

Name: Difference in time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Reviewer Agreed versus the time between the initial SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Agreed
